vocab.meaning: tình đồng đội kiên định, bền chặt
vocab.example: What I find most compelling about team games is the unwavering sense of camaraderie displayed by the players on the field.

vocab.meaning: bầu không khí rõ rệt (có thể cảm nhận được ngay)
vocab.example: There is a palpable atmosphere of excitement in the stadium that you simply don't get when watching individual sports.

vocab.meaning: sự tài tình về mặt chiến thuật
vocab.example: I'm a huge fan of basketball because it’s a sophisticated display of tactical prowess rather than just raw physical strength.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng cảm giác thuộc về một cộng đồng
vocab.example: Watching team games with other supporters helps foster a sense of belonging to a larger community of fans.

vocab.meaning: một kết thúc kịch tính đến nghẹt thở
vocab.example: Nothing beats the adrenaline rush of a nail-biting finish where the outcome is decided in the final seconds of the match.

vocab.meaning: vượt qua mọi dự đoán/khó khăn để thành công
vocab.example: It is incredibly inspiring to watch a small team defy the odds and defeat a world-class opponent through sheer determination.

vocab.meaning: sự hoàn toàn không thể dự đoán trước
vocab.example: The sheer unpredictability of team games keeps me on the edge of my seat throughout the entire ninety minutes.
I appreciate how a victory is the result of a collective effort rather than the individual brilliance of a single star.

vocab.meaning: trải nghiệm thăng trầm đầy cảm xúc
vocab.example: Being a dedicated fan is an emotional rollercoaster, shifting from intense frustration to pure euphoria in minutes.

vocab.meaning: tình trạng thể chất đỉnh cao
vocab.example: It is truly inspiring to see elite athletes in peak physical condition working in perfect synchronization.
